_comment: Token factory registry — maps deployer contract patterns to factory names. Add new launchpads by adding entries here.

factories.name: clanker
factories.notes: Check factory_fees_claimed. Claimed = active creator. Unclaimed >7d = possible bot/abandoned.

factories.name: bankr
factories.notes: Context only. No fee mechanism to check.

factories.name: virtuals
factories.notes: AI agent token factory. Bonding curve launch mechanic.

factories.name: creator_bid
factories.notes: Aerodrome-based token creation. Check LP structure.
